name: mimikatz
summary: mimikatz is a C tool that learns Windows security by experimenting with credentials. It exposes sekurlsa::logonpasswords, sekurlsa::wdigest, sekurlsa::kerberos, dcsync, golden/silver ticket, skeleton key, and many other offensive primitives.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
